member.name: P:Prime.BinCounterService.BinInfo.BinID
member.summary: Sets the bin ID.

member.name: P:Prime.BinCounterService.BinInfo.BinName
member.summary: Sets the bin name.

member.name: P:Prime.BinCounterService.BinInfo.BinCount
member.summary: Sets the bin count.

member.name: P:Prime.BinCounterService.BinInfo.IsHardBin
member.summary: Sets a value indicating whether this is a hard bin.

member.name: T:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService
member.summary: These tests are to validate exposure for all BinCounter APIs from TOS.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetBin
member.summary: Gets the currently set bin.
member.returns: Integer showing current set bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.Exists(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether specified bin exists or not.
member.param: ID of the bin in question.
member.returns: Boolean showing specified bin existence.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.CreateBin(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Adds specified bin to bin definitions.
member.param: Bin group name of newly created bin.
Parent group name of newly created bin.
Specifies if newly created bin is a leaf bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetSortBin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the sortBinID associated to a specific binID.
member.param: ID of the sort bin in question.
member.returns: Integer showing ID of corresponding sort bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.SetBin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets current bin to specified binID.
member.param: ID of current bin to set.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetCurrentHardBin
member.summary: Gets current hardware bin from GetAllBins API.
member.returns: Integer containing the current hardware bin.
member.exception: If HdmtApi::GetAllBins fail or no HardBin value.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
uint hardBin = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IBinCounterService>.Service.GetCurrentHardBin();

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetCurrentSoftBin
member.summary: Gets current software bin from GetAllBins API.
member.returns: Integer containing the current software bin.
member.exception: If HdmtApi::GetAllBins fail or no SoftBin value.

remarks.para: SoftBin and DataBin are equivalent in TOS3.
remarks.example:
This is a code example:
uint softBin = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IBinCounterService>.Service.GetCurrentSoftBin();

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetCurrentDataBin
member.summary: Gets current data bin from GetAllBins API.
member.returns: Integer containing the current data bin.
member.exception: If HdmtApi::GetAllBins fail or no DataBin value.

remarks.para: SoftBin and DataBin are equivalent in TOS3.
remarks.example:
This is a code example:
uint dataBin = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IBinCounterService>.Service.GetCurrentDataBin();

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.SetAllBins(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sets TOS softbin and databin only. The hardbin parameter is not exposed here as its value is ignored by the actual TOS API.

remarks.para: Why no HardBin? HardBin value will be ignore by HdmtApi::SetAllBins API.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetCountersForLot
member.summary: Gets all counters for this lot.
member.returns: Map containing counter names and values for this lot.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
var counters = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<IBinCounterService>.Service.GetCountersForLot();

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.BackupCurrentCounters
member.summary: Backs up the currently incremented counters.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.RestoreBackedUpCounters
member.summary: Restores the backed-up counters.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetBinsForLot
member.summary: Gets all bin information from this lot.
member.returns: Vector containing bin information.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetParentBinId(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Gets the bin ID of a bin's parent bin.
member.returns: Integer of bin's parent bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetTopParentBinId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the bin ID of a bin's top-most parent bin.
member.returns: Integer of bin's top-most parent bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.CreateCounter(System.String)
member.summary: Adds new counter.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetCountersForUnit
member.summary: Get Map of Unit Counters.
member.returns: Unit Counters dictionary.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetPassCountersForUnit
member.summary: Gets a list containing the value of the pass counters for unit.
member.returns: List containing the pass bin counters value information.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetFailCountersForUnit
member.summary: Gets a list containing the value of the fails counters for unit.
member.returns: List containing the fails bin counters value information.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetPassCountersForLot
member.summary: Gets a list containing the value of the pass counters for lot.
member.returns: List containing the pass bin counters value information.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetFailCountersForLot
member.summary: Gets a list containing the value of the fail counters for lot.
member.returns: List containing the fail bin counters value information.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.IsReservedBinSetByTosAlarm
member.summary: Checks if a reserved bin is set by TOS alarm.
member.returns: Boolean showing if reserved bin is set by TOS alarm.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetCompactBinSetByTosAlarm
member.summary: Gets corresponding 4-digit bin from GetReservedBinSetByTosAlarm API.
member.returns: Integer containing 4-digit bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinCounterService.GetExtendedBinSetByTosAlarm
member.summary: Gets corresponding 8-digit bin from GetReservedBinSetByTosAlarm API.
member.returns: Integer containing 8-digit bin.

member.name: T:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinInfo
member.summary: Contains name, count, hardbin status, and ID for particular bin.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinInfo.GetBinName
member.summary: Gets the bin name.
member.returns: String for bin name.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinInfo.GetBinCount
member.summary: Gets the bin count.
member.returns: Integer for bin count.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinInfo.IsHardbin
member.summary: Checks that the bin is a hardBin..
member.returns: Boolean to show hardBin status.

member.name: M:Prime.BinCounterService.IBinInfo.GetBinID
member.summary: Gets the bin ID.
member.returns: Integer for bin ID.
